_reason: Same expired-professor-token issue as section 3. Auth is rejected at the auth middleware before the route handler runs, so the 401 here tells us nothing about whether the status= shadow bug (#93) is fixed. Endpoint exists (otherwise we would see 404), and auth middleware short-circuits properly (400/422 would suggest input validation reaches earlier than auth).

Parent agent should supply correct portal password for a professor account, or wait for the fix on commit 34c54a1 to merge to main and deploy.
